query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN descriptionEn IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as withEn, SUM(CASE WHEN descriptionEn IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as withoutEn FROM scenarios;
